mapper.select: SELECT * FROM permissions WHERE status = '1' ORDER BY order_num ASC, created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permissions (permission_name, permission_key, permission_type, path, component, icon, parent_id, order_num, status, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{permissionName}, #{permissionKey}, #{permissionType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{parentId}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE permissions SET permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_key = #{permissionKey}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, parent_id = #{parentId}, order_num = #{orderNum}, status = #{status}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.status = '1' ORDER BY p.order_num ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = '1' ORDER BY p.order_num ASC
SELECT * FROM permissions WHERE permission_type = 'MENU' AND status = '1' ORDER BY order_num ASC, created_time DESC
